profile.headline: Global MARCOM Leader at MediaTek | Ex Micron, Amazon, Microsoft | CMO | Driving Brand Growth, Strategic Innovation, and World-Scale Impact

company.name: MediaTek
company.overview:
MediaTek Incorporated (TWSE: 2454) is a global fabless semiconductor company that enables nearly 2 billion connected devices a year. We are a market leader in developing innovative systems-on-chip (SoC) for mobile, home entertainment, connectivity and IoT products. Our dedication to innovation has positioned us as a driving market force in several key technology areas, including highly power-efficient mobile technologies, automotive solutions and a broad range of advanced multimedia products such as smartphones, tablets, digital televisions, 5G, Voice Assistant Devices (VAD) and wearables. MediaTek empowers and inspires people to expand their horizons and achieve their goals through smart technology, more easily and efficiently than ever before. We work with the brands you love to make great technology accessible to everyone, and it drives everything we do. Visit www.mediatek.com for more information.

ALERT: MediaTek, along with other companies, have been the victim of unscrupulous individuals fraudulently purporting to be recruiters by fabricating job descriptions and extending spurious offers of employment in an effort to obtain sensitive personal information. We are currently working with authorities to investigate all wrong doings. If you believe you have been a victim, please contact careers.usa@mediatek.com.

Any interested candidates for worldwide positions at MediaTek are asked to apply only through mediatek.com, or via the applicable posting directly on LinkedIn.

profile.summary:
With over three decades of experience in marketing, communications, and business development, I am a global marketing leader passionate about building brands, empowering teams, and delivering impactful results across industries. As Vice President and General Manager of Global Marketing and Communications at MediaTek, I serve as the company’s chief MARCOM executive, overseeing global brand strategy, marketing innovation, strategic partnerships, and corporate communications that connect leading-edge technology with audiences worldwide.
My career has been defined by a drive to accelerate growth, launch industry-leading product lines, and execute innovative, results-driven campaigns. I have built and led high-performing cross-functional teams, managed complex go-to-market strategies, and collaborated with executive leadership to align business objectives with impactful marketing and communication initiatives.
Previously, I held leadership roles at Micron Technology, where I was responsible for corporate marketing and at other global organizations in the technology, digital media, and entertainment segments, including Microsoft, Amazon, HTC, and others. As a board advisor, mentor, and consultant, I have leveraged my AI, emerging technologies, and advanced digital marketing expertise to help companies achieve sustainable growth.
I am committed to fostering innovation, cultivating meaningful connections, and driving transformative strategies that inspire progress and create lasting impact.

experience.title: Vice President and General Manager - Global Marketing and Communications
experience.summary: As MediaTek's chief marketing and communications executive, I am responsible for the company's brand, marketing strategy, go-to-market initiatives, partner marketing, communications, public relations, and other corporate MARCOM functions. Reporting to the company's co-COO, I lead a team of MARCOM executives worldwide.

experience.title: Board Advisor, Mentor, Consultant
experience.summary:
Rahul is a board advisor, mentor, and consultant to a diverse portfolio of companies in the technology, digital marketing, e-commerce, and interactive entertainment industries.  
He serves as an investor, partner and advisor at Reloaded Holdings Inc. (RHI). He also served as an independent advisor to Reloaded's executive team. RHI's principal investment was in Reloaded Games, the company behind blockbuster hard-core free to play MMO's APB Reloaded and Fallen Earth.
In addition to RHI and Reloaded Games, Rahul serves as an advisor to Silver Telegram, a boutique PR and Marketing agency in Long Beach, CA, SoCal EED, a non-profit video games incubator promoted by the City of Corona, Innominds, a leading technology consulting firm, and Globalstep Inc., a global game services company focused on game testing, localization and project management.
experience.company_name: Marketing, Technology, AR, VR, E-Commerce, Interactive Entertainment

experience.title: Vice President Corporate Marketing
experience.summary: Rahul is Micron's  Vice President of Corporate Marketing, responsible for brand, creative studios, business and technology marketing, marketing operations, and digital marketing. The corporate marketing team is a part of Micron's Global Communications and Marketing organization.

experience.title: Head Of Global Marketing & Product Marketing (CPG)
experience.summary:
Rahul leads global marketing for Micron's consumer and commercial products group(CPG). Micron CPG provides a full portfolio of memory and storage products through its consumer brand under Crucial and enterprise brand under Micron.  Crucial is a 25-year brand leader in computer memory and storage, and powers millions of desktops, notebooks, and workstations across the planet. Crucial's innovative products, including DDR5  memory, T700 and  P5 Plus PCIe Internal SSDs, and X8 & X6 Portable SSDs, have infused speed and style into PC gaming and are the memory of choice for the discerning competitive gamer. 
Rahul leads a global team of marketers responsible for brand growth, product marketing, digital marketing, channel marketing, marketing technology, insights and analytics, and e-commerce, in over 200 countries.

experience.title: Vice President Marketing (Viveport)
experience.summary:
Rahul is the corporate vice president of marketing for Viveport, the global app store for virtual reality., and for Vive Studios. Viveport's mission is to democratize access to the world's most diverse selection of immersive experiences by empowering all content creators to reach and engage the fast-growing global VR audience. 
Rahul leads a team of marketers who are responsible for building the Viveport brand. His team’s charter is to (1) discover and attract innovative content creators; empowering them to change the way customers will engage with immersive interactive experiences for generations to come,  (2) Drive product marketing to showcase and merchandise VR experiences on the web, in-device, and on mobile, and (3) lead go to market for metaverse products like Vive Home, Ready Player One, and Viveport Video

experience.title: Corporate Vice President Marketing (Viveport, VIVE Studios, New Platforms)
Head of Marketing - Prime Video Direct
experience.summary: Prime Video is changing the way people watch movies and TV shows, offering ways to instantly stream and watch video content across all screens. Rahul led a marketing team focused on global performance marketing, content marketing, business to business, and business to consumer marketing, for Prime Video Direct, Prime Video's self publishing video platform. He collaborated with the content and product teams to launch the Video Direct Stars program which resulted in driving impactful growth in content selection and engagement for Prime Video subscribers.

experience.title: Head - Digital Marketing, Customer Acquisition and Engagement (Xbox Studios, Hololens Experiences)
experience.summary:
Rahul led marketing for an incubation group in the Hololens experiences team. He was a member of the studio leadership team and responsible for creating and executing the marketing and customer engagement strategy for a specific portfolio of AR experiences. 
Prior to joining the Hololens team, Rahul was responsible for the digital marketing, customer acquisition,  and community management at Team Dakota, the studio behind Project Spark. Project Spark was a revolutionary build your own 3D Metaverse launch title for the Xbox One. He directed a team of performance marketing, community development, and partner outreach managers responsible for the launch and go to market strategy for Project Spark.

experience.title: Chief Marketing Officer and Head of Global Business Development
experience.summary:
Reloaded Games Inc. is an Online Games company powering leading interactive content. The company’s Reloaded Tech platform provides both developers and publishers end-to-end services, including access to a hardcore games audience, content delivery, technology infrastructure, monetization, distribution and analytics. Reloaded's development studios are working on blockbuster metaverse style games across multiple platforms. These include APB Reloaded, Fallen Earth, Hawken, Zombies vs. Zombies and Slot Social. 

Rahul was responsible for Marketing, Online Strategy, Customer Acquisition, Engagement,  Business Development, Licensing, Global Publishing and Public Relations.

experience.title: Vice President - Marketing and Sales
experience.summary:
Gameshastra is a leading games outsourcing services company  and  games publisher. Gameshastra offers strategic outsourcing of Testing, Development and Art / Animation for the Video game Industry. Gameshastra has also evolved into a Game studio and publisher and is currently working with leading publishers to develop games for the console and online markets. As VP-Marketing and Sales, Rahul led all the Marketing, Relationship Management and Sales functions. Rahul was instrumental in scoring development deals with SCEE UK, Nintendo, Big Fish Games and iWin. Rahul crafted the companys vision and blueprint which saw Gameshatra succesfully publishing titles on the Wii, PSP, PS2 and PC. 
Rahul was also a member of the Executive Leadership team at Gameshastra and was responsible for delivering the company's P&L and revenue goals.

experience.title: Consultant
experience.summary: Rahul worked closely with the regional directors at the RIAA in training Federal Agents and regional investigators  on Music licenses and Copyrights. He also developed deep relationships at the leadership of the RIAA to promote the interests of the Indian Music Industry.

experience.title: Client Partner
experience.summary: At HCL America Rahul was responsible for the growth and development of key strategic accounts like Continental Airlines, Rockwell Collins and Rockwell Automation. A member of the Elite 100% Achievers Club in the Sales System, he managed an Account Portfolio of over $50 million.

experience.title: Director - Solutions, Sales and Marketing
experience.summary:
Net Matrix Solutions., Inc is a technology services company that provides a complete portfolio of solutions tailored to unique business and Information Technology needs for Fortune 1000 companies  across North America. Net Matrix was recognized by Inc. Magazine as one of the fastest growing private companies in America (ranked 32nd in the Top 100 IT Services Companies)
Rahul grew the Solutions practice at Net Matrix from zero to $10mn in under a year. He created and managed Blue-Chip relationships like Technicolor, GE, AT Kearney, PSC, HISD, SPSA and Scientific Atlanta.

experience.title: Head of Marketing, Sales, and Licensing (Saregama USA)
experience.summary: Rahul was the independent head for West Coast, South and Midwest Operations. He developed relationships with key Mainstream Institutional Customers and created licensing and distribution opportunities with major labels for Indian Music. Achieved expansion of EMI-Saregama's distribution base to include nearly 2000 mainstream stores like Borders, etc. He established direct relationships with Universal Music, BMG for cross licensing of Saregama's Indian Music Repertoire. Rahul devised strategies for the entire product range of Saregama including the World Music Catalog, Ravi Shankar Catalog, etc which included nearly 20,000 titles. Architected a pioneering ecommerce venture, www.hamaracd.com - The World's first CD on Demand website. He was instrumental in managing relationships with the RIAA, ASCAP and various other trade bodies in the USA. Achieved a remarkable growth of nearly 40% for EMI’s world / classical music in the US market. Attended MIDEM in 2003 at Cannes, France.

experience.title: Sr. Manager (HMV / Saregama India)
experience.summary:
Rahul joined EMI India after completing his MBA. EMI India was jointly owned by the RPG Enterprises and EMI UK. While in India he was involved in various roles with EMI (Now known as Saregama India). Some of the Key Responsibilities included:
1. A&R - New Artiste Development
2. Product Marketing 
3. Sales and Distribution
4. e-Commerce and Digital Delivery of Music
5. International Distribution of Indian Music Repertoire.

experience.title: Manager (RPG Enterprises)
experience.summary: RPG Enterprises is a diversified conglomerate with business interests in Consumer Products, Media and Entertainment, Retail, Life-sciences, Financial services, Utilities and Industrial infrastructure. They are the parent group which owns iconic companies like Saregama (Formerly EMI India), Spencers Retail, Food World, Music World, CEAT Tyres et al. Rahul joined them after completing his MBA and was seconded to their Entertainment division as a manager at Saregama HMV (Formerly EMI India).

experience.title: Vice President Global Theme Program
experience.summary: Present in over 800 universities in 89 countries and territories, AIESEC, the world's largest student organization, is the international platform for young people to discover and develop their potential so as to have a positive impact in society. Towards this aim, AIESEC runs more than 350 conferences, provide 3,500 work abroad opportunities, and offer over 5,000 leadership positions to their members each year. Rahul was the Vice President for an AIESEC chapter in India where he was heading the Global Theme Program Initiative.

certifications.name: The 4 Stages of Psychological Safety Workshop
Advanced diploma in systems strategy and design

publications.title: App Zap Pump Play - the Elements to help achieve your goals (www.appzap.me)
publications.description: The authors aim to help the reader create an effective 30 day plan to get employed.

publications.title: Rahul”s Personal Blog
publications.description: This is my personal blog site, where I share thoughts and ideas on topics I am passionate about.

candidate.headline: Aria Care Partners
candidate.snippet: "2"> Erin Rake, DDS - Aria Care Partners LinkedIn · Erin Rake, DDS <div c

profile.headline: Chief Medical Officer for Dental & Clinical Dentist

company.name: Aria Care Partners
company.overview:
Aria Care Partners is the leading provider of onsite ancillary medical services for skilled nursing facilities. With more than 25 years of a collaborative partnership with 3,000 + skilled nursing facilities, Aria Care Partners remains on the leading edge of integrated care delivery, understanding the connection between dental, vision, hearing and podiatry services to resident health and well-being. With a unique combination of turnkey insurance solutions and innovative service delivery, Aria Care Partners is passionate about enriching quality of life for every resident and ensuring that every family knows their loved ones are well cared for and safe. 

Our Promise: The Senior Standard of Care 

Services
•	Dental Care: Exams, preventative, restorative and prosthodontics
•	Vision Care: Exams, eye disorder treatment and monitoring, eyewear
•	Hearing Care: Exams, assistive hearing support, ear health 
•	Podiatry Care: Exams, trimmings, and ingrown nail care
•	Insurance: Proactive enrollment at no cost to facilities or residents through Medicaid offset 
•	Care Management: Dedicated support team to introduce and simplify insurance and billing
locations: 8500 W 110th St, Suite 260, US

profile.summary:
Chief Medical Officer, Geriatric Dentist - Aria Care Partners, Overland Park, KS (March 2017 – Present)

My purpose in the realm of dental services for the underserved population of the elderly is multifaceted yet deeply meaningful. Through compassion, relationship-building, and a commitment to making a positive impact, I endeavor to enhance the lives of thousands within this population. By championing holistic care, dignity, and respect, I aspire to contribute to a future where every elderly individual can enjoy optimal oral health and well-being.

Strategic Leadership:
•	Developed and executed comprehensive strategic plans aligning dental services with organizational objectives.
•	Provide visionary leadership to optimize the quality, efficiency, and effectiveness of dental care.

Clinical Oversight:
•	Established and maintain high clinical standards and protocols ensuring the delivery of top-tier dental services.
•	Collaborate with dental professionals to enhance patient and skilled nursing home facility’s outcomes and satisfaction.

Compliance and Regulatory Affairs:
•	Ensure strict adherence to industry regulations, standards, and guidelines, maintaining impeccable compliance.
•	Formulated and implemented policies to uphold a high level of regulatory compliance within the dental department.

Resource Management:
•	Elevated training initiatives to cultivate a skilled and motivated dental team.
•	Created and implemented a mentorship program for the dentist across 14 states.

Quality Improvement:
•	Established and monitor robust quality assurance programs, continuously improving dental service delivery.
•	Implemented initiatives enhancing patient safety, satisfaction, and overall experience.
•	Implemented initiatives enhancing Dentist and clinical staff safety, satisfaction, and overall experience.

Collaboration and Communication:
•	Foster a culture of collaboration and effective communication within the dental department and across organizational units.
•	Work closely with executive leadership, integrating dental strategies into the overall organizational framework.

Clinical Dentist:
•	Provide general dentistry services to the physically and mentally compromised patients in the skilled nursing homes.
•	Conduct restorative procedures such as fillings, dentures, extractions, and examinations.
•	Educate patients and skilled nursing healthcare staff on oral hygiene practices and preventive care.

experience.title: Dentist
experience.summary: Mobile dentist for the skilled nursing population.

experience.title: Region Dental Liaison
experience.summary: Clinical Dentist, Dental Liaison, Infection Control Coordinator, and Speaker on strategies for geriatric and cognitively declining patient's oral care

experience.title: Dentist
experience.summary: Private general dental practice
experience.locality: 167 N. Dan Jones Road, Plainfield, IN 46168

experience.title: Dentist
experience.summary: General dentist

experience.title: Restorative Faculty
experience.summary: Facilitate small group learning, laboratory instructor and clinical instructor.

education.school_name: The University of Alabama Graduate School

My career has been defined by a drive to accelerate growth, launch industry-leading product lines, and execute innovative, results-driven campaigns. profile.headline: International Justice Facilitator at United Nations - working towards inclusive justice for Syria. Lawyer | Advocate | Writer | Peace Seeker

company.name: International, Impartial and Independent Mechanism - Syria (IIIM)
company.overview:
The International, Impartial and Independent Mechanism (IIIM) is mandated by the United Nations to assist in the investigation and prosecution of individuals responsible for serious international crimes, including war crimes, crimes against humanity, and genocide committed in Syria since March 2011. To achieve this, the IIIM collects and analyses information and evidence of such crimes. It conducts targeted investigations, prepares analytical reports, and consults with Syrian civil society organizations and victim/survivor associations to inform its work.
 
Although the IIIM is not a court and cannot indict or prosecute individuals, it plays a crucial role by sharing information and evidence as well as its analytical work with competent jurisdictions now, and also prepares for future justice options as and when available.
 
The IIIM was established by the United Nations General Assembly in 2016, following the failure of efforts to refer the Syria situation to the International Criminal Court (ICC). The IIIM accountability model, which was unique at the time of creation, has since inspired the establishment of other accountability mechanisms.
company.headquarter: Palais des Nations, Genève, Switzerland, 1211, CH

profile.summary:
For the past 25 years, I have worked to address atrocities committed in some of the bloodiest conflicts the world has seen, particularly the 1990s conflicts in the Balkans, the 1994 genocide in Rwanda and the situation in the Syrian Arab Republic. I have contributed to the innovative international justice project from an early stage, championing progressive approaches, integrated action, empowerment of victims/survivors and inclusive justice. I have been immersed in examining the structural factors driving conflicts, the roles played by individuals and institutions in fueling extreme violence, and the impact of discrimination and exclusion on people and communities. I am energised by the opportunity to advocate on bridging the divide between accountability, humanitarian action and peace building, as well as gender-sensitive institution building. I am absorbed by the systems change challenge confronting our planet.

I am an Australian lawyer with 30 years of legal experience working in national and international contexts, including as Deputy Head of the United Nations (UN) International, Impartial and Independent Mechanism (IIIM-Syria), Deputy to the Prosecutor at the UN International Criminal Tribunal for the Former Yugoslavia (UNICTY) and in other international expert advisory roles. I have also worked as a legal practitioner in Australia, as a consultant with the UN Secretariat and as a trainer, researcher and writer. My focus areas include international criminal law, rule of law capacity building, inclusive approaches to transitional justice, and gender and armed conflict. I have high-level management experience with international organisations, including in the complex contexts of a large organization approaching mandate completion and a new entity with a novel mandate starting up.

publications.title: Prosecuting Conflict Related Sexual Violence at the ICTY
publications.description: Sexual violence directed at both females and males is a reality in many conflicts throughout the world today, but accountability for the perpetrators of such violence remains the exception rather than the rule. While awareness of the problem grows, more effective approaches are urgently needed for the investigation and prosecution of conflict-related sexual violence crimes. Upon its establishment in 1993, the Office of the Prosecutor (OTP) of the International Criminal Tribunal for the Former Yugoslavia (ICTY) began the challenging task of prosecuting the perpetrators of conflict-related sexual violence crimes, alongside the many other atrocities committed during the conflicts there. This book documents the experiences, achievements, challenges, and fundamental insights of the OTP in prosecuting conflict-related sexual violence crimes at the ICTY over the past two decades. It draws on an extensive dossier of OTP documentation, court filings, trial exhibits, testimony, ICTY judgments, and other materials, as well as interviews with current and former OTP staff. The book provides a unique analytical perspective on the obstacles faced in prioritizing, investigating, and prosecuting conflict-related sexual violence crimes. While ICTY has made great strides in developing international criminal law in this area, this volume exposes the pressing need for determined and increasingly sophisticated strategies in order to overcome the ongoing obstacles in prosecuting conflict-related sexual violence crimes. The book presents concrete recommendations to inform future work being done at national and international levels, including that of the International Criminal Court (ICC), international investigation commissions, and countries developing transitional justice processes.

publications.title: Women, War and Reflections on Srebrenica
Women, Armed Conflict and International Law
publications.description:
The role that gender plays in determining the experience of those caught up in armed conflict has long been overlooked. Moreover, the extent to which gender influences the international legal regime designed to address the humanitarian problems arising from armed conflict has similarly been ignored. In the early 1990s, prompted by extensive media coverage of the rape of women during the conflict in Bosnia Herzegovina, the international community was forced to critically examine the capacity of international law to respond to such crimes. The prevalence of sexual violence, is, however, merely one aspect of the distinctive impact of conflict on women. Although a range of factors influence the way individual women experience armed conflict, the endemic gender discrimination that exists in all societies is a common theme: from Cambodia, where women land-mine victims are less likely to receive treatment for their injuries than are men; to South Africa, where women widowed during the Apartheid years have become outcasts in their own society. To date, the extent to which international law addresses the myriad of ways in which women are affected by armed conflict has received little attention.
This work takes the experience of women of armed conflict, matches it with existing provisions of international law, and investigates reasons for the silence of the latter in relation to these events for women. It is the first broad-based critique of international humanitarian law from a gender perspective. The contribution of the United Nations, through its focus on human rights, to improving the protection of women in armed conflict is also considered. The authors underscore the need for new approaches to the issue of women and armed conflict, and canvass a range of options for moving forward.

Two simple things: the best products and the best people.  We've built a solid reputation for our ethical business practices and being great members of our community.

The Rohrman Automotive Group has been providing the Midwest with quality new and used vehicles for well over 40 years. In that time we have never rested on our accomplishments or pretended that we already do enough for our customers. We have sought to expand and to bring our products to more and more people by expanding to Indianapolis and Fort Wayne, Indiana, Chicagoland, Illinois, and Kenosha, Wisconsin. We believe that everyone deserves a quality car buying experience, and that everyone deserves to have a great vehicle that they can rely on.

Even though we have expanded in size to compete with some of the biggest dealership groups in America, we still have never forgotten about our customers or where we came from. approach. My role was that of a carer alongside other professionals such

equipment.

from the district nurses to enabled me to use the PEG to provide food and
give medications, massage training from the physios, training from the
OT to use the development equipment correctly (such as an eye gaze) and
training from the SALT to learn correct communication techniques and
routine to assist in daily activities and assist the client with feeding

experience.title: Information Technology Team Lead - Epic TDR Lead for Brooksource at AdventHealth
Information Technology Field Technician - Epic TDR
experience.summary: Assisting Advent Health in facilitating a smooth transition into using the Epic software by performing technical dress rehearsals within different departments of their hospitals and remote locations.

experience.title: Field Support Technician
experience.summary: Primary role consisted of doing TDR testing for Orlando Health's transition into the Epic software. During our wave into the St. Cloud Hospital portion of the project, I received the opportunity to work in different areas of the project such as: deployments, break/fix, and general directing of team efforts. Because of my knowledge of general day to day operations, I was given the opportunity to work as a team lead of one of the field support teams at St. Cloud Hospital when they went live with Epic.

experience.title: Transportation Management Coordinator
experience.summary: Responsible for scheduling and selecting the modes of transportation for personnel and equipment. Organize, plan and oversee the movement of those vehicles, personnel and cargo worldwide.
